meta-description: Naufal Saif is a Web Developer who masters Codeigniter, Laravel, Next.js and provides website creation services
deskripsi-tentang-saya: Hello! I’m Muhammad Naufal Saif Alfauzan, a full-stack developer from Bogor and a graduate of the Computer Science program at Bina Insani University. I enjoy designing and building clean, efficient, and user-friendly applications. With experience spanning both backend and frontend development, I’m accustomed to creating systems that run smoothly from start to finish. For me, technology is about solving real-world problems. That’s why I’m always eager to keep learning, collaborate with teams, and create products that are truly useful.
timeline-1: Attended SMK ALBAHRI in Bekasi, majoring in Software Engineering.
timeline-2: I am studying Computer Science at Bina Insani University in Bekasi.
